environments.name: The Clinical Anchor
environments.psychological_meaning: Structural processing and psychological vulnerability. Represents the analytical mind.
environments.creative_constraint: Rigid but supportive. Clean lines meets soft fabrics.

environments.name: The Greenhouse of Growth
environments.psychological_meaning: Neuroplasticity and self-regulation. Represents the evolving self.
environments.visual_tone: Lush greens, smooth gradients, rhythmic motion
environments.creative_constraint: Purely organic. Branching systems and neural-like networks.

environments.name: The Ascent of Resilience
environments.visual_tone: High contrast, cool blues and earthy browns
environments.creative_constraint: Biologically inspired geometry. Folds and rugged textures.

environments.name: The Horizon of Calm
environments.psychological_meaning: Clarity, mindfulness, and the vastness of the subconscious.
environments.visual_tone: Soft blues, smooth motion (waves), high transparency
environments.creative_constraint: Light and motion as primary tools. Flowing, airy structures.

environments.name: The Records of Reason
environments.visual_tone: Warm, muted colors, low energy, rhythmic light
environments.creative_constraint: Intricate microstructures. Every element must be interpretable.
